description_long: This hamburger features a rounded sesame seed bun with a lightly toasted, golden-brown surface dotted with white sesame seeds. The top bun sits atop a thick, dark brown patty, which is partially visible along the edges. Underneath the patty, there is a layer of green, crinkled lettuce and a slice of yellow cheese, both peeking out from the sides. The bottom bun is slightly thinner and matches the color and texture of the top bun. The overall appearance is appetizing and classic, with the ingredients neatly stacked and evenly distributed. The hamburger looks fresh and ready to eat, making it a recognizable and appealing food item in any urban setting.
description: A classic hamburger with a sesame seed bun, visible lettuce, cheese, and a thick patty. The ingredients are neatly layered and the bun is golden-brown with sesame seeds.
description_view_0: The hamburger is seen from a slightly low angle, highlighting the sesame seed bun, cheese corners, and a generous layer of lettuce peeking out.
description_view_1: This view centers the hamburger, showing the symmetry of the bun and the even distribution of sesame seeds and toppings.
description_view_2: The patty and cheese are more prominent, with the lettuce layer clearly visible along the bottom edge.
description_view_3: The cheese slice and lettuce are visible, with the bun's texture and sesame seeds well defined on top.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce and cheese are layered beneath the patty, with the cheese corners and lettuce edges extending beyond the bun. The toppings are evenly distributed around the circumference.
